data.content: Implemented StepMetadata-driven prompt output resolution for built-in compatibility prompts on branch knots-0d93-codex-step-metadata. Refactored installed_workflows prompt helpers to accept explicit resolved ActionOutputDef inputs, updated compatibility.rs to pass profile.step_metadata_for(action_state).output into render_prompt_body(), and updated test helpers to use the same resolution path. Added regressions for explicit output metadata injection and autopilot_with_pr shipment_review rendering. Validation: cargo test render_prompt_body_uses_explicit_output_metadata; cargo test builtin_pr_profile_shipment_review_includes_pr_content; make sanity; git push pre-push sanity. Commit: 030c9e653a81.
